yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Metasploit_WrapUp_03272026 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Metasploit Wrap-Up 03/27/2026"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-28"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Ransomware_Under_Pressure_Tactics_Techni {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Ransomware Under Pressure: Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures in a Shifting Thr"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-28"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-11" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Free_real_estate_GoPix_the_banking_Troja {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Free real estate: GoPix, the banking Trojan living off your memory"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-28"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "GoPix" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE20261679__net_eswifi_socket_send_payl {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-1679 - net: eswifi socket send payload length not bounded"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-28"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-1679" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE20264987__SureForms__252__Unauthentic {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-4987 - SureForms <= 2.5.2 - Unauthenticated Payment Amount Validation B"

    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-4987" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "SureForms" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 110 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 83 as HIGH risk. 41 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
